subcodes.first_line: O thou who treadest the wilderness of guidance! Hearken unto the Call from the right-hand side of the Most Glorious Tree, verily it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها السائر فی بریه الهدی ان استمع الندا من شطر الایمن من شجر الابهی انه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @knowledge; recognition of God
